name: url-ai
description: Url Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: parse_url
tools.description: Parse a URL into its components with detailed analysis.

tools.name: shorten_url_data
tools.description: Generate a deterministic short URL hash (does not create actual redirect).

tools.name: check_url_safety
tools.description: Analyze URL for potential safety issues (heuristic-based, no external calls).

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Extract metadata from URL structure (no HTTP requests).
